2988628.title: Schönbrunn Concert 2021
2988628.description: Dirigent: Daniel Harding en de Wiener Philharmoniker. G. Verdi: Ouvertüre to Les vêpres siciliennes. S. Rachmaninoff: Rhapsody on a Theme of Paganini, op. 43 (Soloist). L. Bernstein: Symphonic Dances from West Side Story: Prologue - Somewhere - Scherzo - Mambo. E. Elgar: Salut d'Amour, op. 12. J. Sibelius: Karelia-Suite, op. 11: No. 1. Intermezzo. C. Debussy: Prélude à l'après-midi d'un faun. G. Holst: The Planets, Symphonic Suite, op. 32: Jupiter, The Bringer of Jollity.
